title: How to get the URL for an item
excerpt: how do you  populate the link to an item in a column? Im open to using make.com and or column magic.

posts.author: BrandiLKT (Brandi LaRue)
posts.cookedHtml: how do you populate the link to an item in a column? Im open to using make.com and or column magic.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

This depends on how you are getting the information from the item in the first place, but generally speaking, the URL for an item will look something like this:

accountname.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

Cheers,
Matias
